name: Rebalancing Strategy
about: Propose a new portfolio rebalancing strategy
title: '[Strategy] '

---

## Strategy Overview
Describe the rebalancing approach.

## Motivation
Why is this strategy useful for portfolio management?

## Algorithm
Describe the rebalancing logic:
- Trigger conditions (e.g., drift threshold, time interval)
- Calculation method (e.g., proportional, threshold-based)
- Edge cases (e.g., new assets, zero balances)

## Parameters
List configurable parameters and their expected ranges.

## Test Cases
Describe test scenarios that validate the strategy:
1. Normal rebalance
2. Single asset portfolio
3. Large drift

## References
Links to financial literature or existing implementations.
